steps.title: Isolate the x term
steps.content:
To find the equivalent equation, solve the original. Start with $11x + 50 = 160$ and subtract 50 from both sides:
$$11x = 160 - 50$$

steps.title: Evaluate and match
steps.content:
Simplify the arithmetic:
$$11x = 110$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
